display_name: Product Sales By Day Part - Hourly Drill-Down View
author: Claude Code
description: Comprehensive hourly sales breakdown showing Sales, Guest Counts, and Average Check metrics for a single day with YoY comparison. Matches 'Drill Down View' design.

Date.description: NZ Date for the hourly breakdown (single day)

key_features: 24 hourly rows (00-01 through 23-24) + 1 Total Day row
Sales metrics: Sales, % Day, % Inc YoY
Guest Count metrics: GCs, % Day, % Inc YoY
Average Check metrics: Ave Chq, % Inc YoY
YoY comparison (364 days back for same day-of-week)
Scaffold pattern ensures all 24 hours appear
Total Day row (sum of all 24 hours) at end
Total row aligns with parent screen day totals
OPTIMIZED: Single table scan with conditional aggregation
OPTIMIZED: Window functions for grand total calculation
OPTIMIZED: RECOMPILE hint for optimal execution plan
notes: This is a drill-down from Product Sales By Day Part. Shows all metrics (Sales, GCs, Ave Chq) in a single wide-format query. Total Day row should match parent screen day totals. Complete rewrite from original 5-column design to 9-column drill-down view.
